Struggling with Sleep in Cleveland? Here's the Exact Protocol That Works.

A clinically structured sleep protocol designed to regulate cortisol, calm your nervous system, and restore deep, consistent sleep.

What's Actually Happening

This Is Not a Willpower Problem

Living with the Lake Erie winters and rust belt resilience pressure takes a toll your body keeps track of — even when you don't.

  • Waking between 2–4am unable to fall back asleep
  • Mind racing the moment your head hits the pillow
  • Exhausted after 7–8 hours — like you never slept
  • Depending on alcohol or sleep aids just to get through the night

This is not a sleep habit problem. This is a dysregulated nervous system problem.

Dr. Felicia Stoler
DCN · MS · RDN · FACSM · FAND · Dipl ACLM · Principal Investigator
Doctor of Clinical Nutrition. Registered Dietitian Nutritionist. Fellow of the American College of Sports Medicine. Board-certified Lifestyle Medicine physician. Fullscript-credentialed dispensary. She audits every protocol on this platform for clinical accuracy, safety, and outcome integrity. She never prescribes. She certifies the knowledge infrastructure that serves you.
Clinical Assessment

What BLEU Sees

BLEU · ALVAI Protocol Engine · Cleveland, OH
Current State
Sleep disruption driven by elevated nighttime cortisol and chronic sympathetic activation.
Root Cause Analysis
  • Cortisol rhythm misalignment — cortisol stays elevated when it should be falling
  • Inadequate parasympathetic (rest-and-digest) activation before sleep
  • Nervous system locked in fight-or-flight at bedtime
Protocol Components
  • Magnesium Glycinate (400mg — evening)
  • L-Theanine (200mg — 30 min before bed)
  • 30-minute nervous system downregulation routine
  • Blue light elimination after 8pm
  • Cortisol-lowering evening nutrition protocol
The Protocol

Sleep Reset Protocol

30 days
01
Magnesium Glycinate
Supports deep muscle relaxation and cortisol reduction. Most critical element.
02
L-Theanine
Reduces mental overactivity without sedation. Calms the racing mind.
03
Evening Reset Routine
30-minute structured wind-down. Stabilizes cortisol before sleep window.
04
Dr. Stoler's Nutritional Guidance
Evening foods that support melatonin production and nervous system recovery.

Common Questions

What People in Cleveland Ask

How quickly will I notice improvement in Cleveland? +
Most people notice a meaningful shift within 7–10 days. Full nervous system regulation typically takes 30 days.
Do I need a prescription for any of this? +
No. Every component is non-prescription. Clinically structured, not pharmaceutical.
Is this safe to use with my current medications? +
BLEU's drug interaction engine screens for conflicts automatically. Always disclose your full medication list.
What makes this different from melatonin or sleep apps? +
Melatonin treats a symptom. This protocol addresses root cause — cortisol rhythm and nervous system regulation.
